nasb.text: For we are sojourners before You, and tenants, as all our fathers were; our days on the earth are like a shadow, and there is no hope.

esv.text: For we are strangers before you and sojourners, as all our fathers were. Our days on the earth are like a shadow, and there is no abiding.

cnv.text: 我們在你面前是客旅，是寄居的，像我們的列祖一樣；我們在世上的日子好像影兒，沒有指望。

ccb.text: 我们在你面前只是客旅，是寄居的，像我们祖先一样；我们在世的日子就像影子一样转瞬即逝。
